final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-grade Chinese ethnic costume infographic in the style of a National Museum exhibition panel.

Style/medium: needs a National Museum exhibition panel aesthetic — exact paper texture and typography treatment is yours, must achieve "museum-grade, archival, professional, collectible" quality
Composition: must follow fixed layout structure:
  - Top: Chinese main title + subtitle + introduction
  - Left: structural breakdown zone with Chinese leader-line annotations and close-up details
  - Upper right: material / craft / texture zone with real texture swatches and descriptions
  - Middle right: pattern / color / symbolism zone with main color palette, pattern samples and cultural explanations
  - Bottom: wearing sequence / construction flowchart + core feature summary
Subject: must include a full-body standing figure wearing authentic Chinese ethnic minority costume OR a central structural breakdown diagram if object-focused — exact ethnic group and costume system is yours to determine from "中国少数民族服饰" (Chinese ethnic minority costumes)
Scene/backdrop: must be paper-textured background in off-white, silk-paper white, or pale tea tones — exact shade and grain is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a museum archival atmosphere — exact lighting direction is yours, must achieve "restrained, professional, scholarly" feeling
Color palette: needs an archival museum color direction — exact hex values are yours, must support "高级、克制、专业、可收藏" (premium, restrained, professional, collectible) quality
Materials/textures: must include realistic fabric texture samples, material differences, and authentic surface treatments — exact rendering technique is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text in Simplified Chinese, clearly readable and properly formatted:
  - 主标题 (main title)
  - 副标题 (subtitle)
  - 导语 (introduction)
  - 结构拆解中文引线标注 (Chinese leader-line labels for structural breakdown)
  - 材质/工艺/质感说明 (material/craft/texture descriptions)
  - 纹样/色彩/寓意说明 (pattern/color/symbolism explanations)
  - 穿着顺序/构成流程 (wearing sequence/construction flow)
  - 核心特征总结 (core feature summary)
Constraints: must preserve all layout zones as specified, must use Simplified Chinese exclusively, must achieve "真实写实主视觉、结构拆解、中文标注、材质说明、纹样寓意、色彩含义和核心特征总结" (realistic main visual, structural breakdown, Chinese annotations, material descriptions, pattern symbolism, color meanings, core feature summary), must avoid poster/photography studio/e-commerce/anime/cosplay aesthetics
Avoid: must avoid poster feeling, photography studio feeling, e-commerce feeling, anime feeling, cosplay feeling, incorrect annotations, wrong structures, illegible text, fake materials, excessive decoration
